mentions.note: Deep value spec on power plant construction; stock up 30% YTD. Cramer: wait for pullback, don't chase parabolic moves.
Pure speculation after 360% rally from $0.22 lows; converts coal plants to natural gas for AI data centers; high debt, losses, unproven execution; wait for pullback before buying.
Data center power generation renaissance; 160-year company with proven steam turbine tech; $2.7B backlog, 2500% 12-month rally; Base Electron (Applied Digital) deals, future-proofing capability.
